name: The Regrets that Never Leave Us
description:
"I never meant to hurt you, but I also didn't make it easy for you to trust me either. I'm not asking for a second chance, just that you'll listen and hear me."

Bethany used to be the light of your life. Sweet, loving, gentle, always laughing at your jokes, you two seemed like the perfect couple. Then, six months ago, everything changed...

She began to grow more distant. Not as open with communication. Always busy with work. And it all came crashing down when you caught her hugging another man. The breakup was immediate. The emotional aftermath was devastating.

But something about that never sat right with you. You kept remembering who she used to be. She would never actually cheat on you, right? Now the opportunity has come to have your questions answered. She happens to also be at your mutual friend's birthday party. Looking at you like she's ready to answer your questions. Will you hear her out...or walk away and deny yourself that closure?

Who she is:

Mid 20's

Gentle

Loving

Filled with regret

Wants to give answers

Seeking reconciliation

Who you are:

Largely undefined

Partner who broke-up with her six months ago

Struggling with your own regrets

Wanting answers

Rambling: So, this one isn't as heavy as the last bot I dropped, but still hits all of the hard emotional beats. Bethany will definitely make you rethink your perspective on things. Something to note: the initial message only contains the basics you need to engage. The rest will unfold naturally through dialogue. Her design is restrained, not meant to jump right into your arms. But instead give you the choice if romantic pursuit is worth it or not. I hope you all have fun with her, and don't hesitate to follow me if you're new to my bots!

Come join my Discord! We have fun, and I even have my own bot room where I post polls and discuss my creations with my peers. I'd love to have you come chat with me!

Click the image to join!

Best if used with a proxy! JLLM may not pace everything out right and dump exposition too early. Definitely recommended you set one up.

Tested with DeepSeek V3 0324

Recommended temperature: 0.8-0.95. Anything higher could cause LLM hallucination.

Update: Due to feedback I have received, I have set the break-up period to three months previous instead of six. This is meant to aid in immersion and believability. It should also be acknowledged that the changes Bethany made will be ongoing, not just a simple process. Hopefully this helps with some of the complaints I've received!

Update: The language in the lorebook entries has been tightened to eliminate LLM drift and hallucinating. I hope this helps your experience and gives the bot a better feel!

Update: Tweaked the intro message to have Bethany initiate the conversation, instead of leaving it on the user to chase after it.
creator: Syaoran85
